section.div: Templates and resources for developing your own firmware for the splines module
State-of-the-art audio codec with 90x compression factor. Supports 44.1kHz, 24kHz, and 16kHz mono/stereo audio.
firmware for the zeptocore, zeptoboard, ectocore, and ezeptocore
Synthesizer plug-in (previously released as Vember Audio Surge)
My plugins for VCVRack, which you may enjoy.

ZFS Management GUI & Web UI for Linux, macOS and FreeBSD. Provides both Desktop GUI and Web UI interfaces. Simplifies common ZFS administration tasks for pools, datasets, volumes, and snapshots, including creation, destruction, property editing, snapshots, rollback, and encryption management.
ASIO to Pipewire. Better solution for low latency audio inside Wine. Works with SteamRT.
Core algorithms and objects for the Fluid Corpus Manipulation Library
OpenSnitch is a GNU/Linux interactive application firewall inspired by Little Snitch.
Hobby operating system for vintage 32-bit PCs
openFrameworks addon for Ableton Link Audio: stream audio between oF apps, Ableton Live, TouchDesigner, Max/MSP, and VCV Rack.
Leveraging WebAssembly, Ocre supports OCI-like application containers on Zephyr and Linux in a footprint up to 2,000x lighter than traditional Linux-based container runtimes such as Docker and Podman
AkiraOS is a modular, security-focused embedded platform for resource-constrained devices. Built on Zephyr RTOS with WebAssembly (WASM) runtime support and container technology
Eurorack blank panel SVG generator for laser cutting
